skills.description: Does Pierce ATK-scaled damage to all enemies.
Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy and lowers ATK by [debuff.value]% for [debuff.duration] turns.

ultimate.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy.

passive.name: Flowing Ruin
passive.description: After using a skill, gains 1 Flowing Ruin stack. At 3 stacks, the next skill consumes all stacks, deals 50% more damage, and lowers target ATK by 50% for 2 turns.

mechanics.name: Flowing Ruin Stack
mechanics.triggerText: After each skill used by this character

mechanics.name: Flowing Ruin Empowerment
mechanics.triggerText: When there are 3 stacks of Flowing Ruin
mechanics.description: At 3 stacks, the next skill consumes all stacks, deals 50% more damage, and lowers target ATK by 50% for 2 turns.
